title: Espresso Measuring Cup with Handle and Pour Spout, 3oz, Ceramic, Vintage White
description:
About this item
WHY CERAMIC? Ceramic maintains heat of your espresso shot better than other materials and creates a non-porous surface that is easily cleaned
THIS ESPRESSO CUP is made of strong and durable ceramic that will not break easily like glass
BEAUTIFULLY DESIGNED but heavy for its cute size, it will not slide or move if espresso machine vibrates when brewing
MEASURING SCALE in the cup helps with pulling a perfect 1:2 ratio shot of espresso each time
When you buy from BelovedBlessings, you are supporting a small American based business, Thank you
reviews_5s:
I am loving the perfect little measuring cup. Its ceramic cream color matches perfect with my kitchen decor. I bought extras to give as gifts. ☕️I wanted something cute but also functional to brew my espresso in. This little cup is perfect and the spout makes for easy pouring.The cutest little expresso size mug, i love it, exactly what i was looking for, its look super cute on my expreso machineLove the handle and measurements!Accurate measuring and stylish too.I purchased this ceramic measuring cup for my cappuccino maker. I really like the handle, and the measurements are easy for me to see. Well made!Exactly as expected. I'm satisfied.First off, I like this item because it goes with my kitchen decor. Vintage ,barn house, shabby chic.

Great for using your own ground coffee to make your espresso coffee in the morning if you want a change from using pods. This way any ground coffee that you have can be used and you are not limited to using pods.As a barista, you can’t go wrong with this one. Perfect for your espresso. It looks like it can hold up to a quad. The quality is great and it’s very sleek. Looks nice next to the machine as decor as well. 5 stars for quality, appearance and functionality and has measurements in side as well.A must have collectible for coffee lovers! Great quality and value!
